creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 162538
Add SWANCTL and fix libvici install

- Add a new option, SWANCTL, to install swanctll utility
- When VICI option is selected, install libvici.h to include directory, it's useful when you need to build a custom code linked to libvici
- Pass path to USE_LDCONFIG otherwise libraries will not be visible
